---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Download the full CV as a PDF: **[CV — Morgane Gonon (PDF)](cv.pdf)**
:::

---

## Current Position

**PhD Candidate in Ecological Economics** — *September 2022 – present*
CIRED / AgroParisTech / Université Paris-Saclay, Paris, France
Supervised by Harold Levrel (AgroParisTech) and Antoine Godin (AFD), under the Ecological Accounting Chair.

---

## Affiliations

- PhD Candidate, Université Paris-Saclay
- International Research Center for Environment and Development ([CIRED](https://www.centre-cired.fr/en/))
- Associate Researcher, French Development Agency ([AFD](https://www.afd.fr/en))
- Former Associate Researcher, Coalition for Climate Capacity (C3A) Nature Hub, World Bank
- Earth System Governance Research Fellow Network

---

## Education

| Year | Degree | Institution |
|---|---|---|
| 2020–2021 | Master, Energy, Finance & Carbon (EFC) | Université Paris Dauphine PSL |
| 2018–2020 | Master, Administrative & Judicial Careers | Sciences Po Grenoble |
| 2016–2017 | International Mobility Year | University of Ottawa |
| 2015–2018 | Bachelor, Institutions & Mutations of Public Action | Sciences Po Grenoble |

---

## Employment History

**Short-Term Consultant** — *January 2024 – June 2025*
The World Bank (C3A Nature Hub), Paris, France
International financial instruments to reverse nature loss.

**Data Analyst** — *May – November 2022*
Office Français de la Biodiversité (OFB), Paris, France
Developed the indicator "State Spending Harmful to Biodiversity" (Ecological Accounting Chair / FRB).

**Secretary General** — *September 2019 – January 2022*
Institut Rousseau, Paris, France
Board of Directors and Editorial Committee; editorial strategy, working groups, press campaigns.

**Intern** — *November 2019 – March 2020*
ClimateWorks Australia (Monash University), Melbourne, Australia
Net Zero Momentum Tracker; Land Use Futures; Energy Transition Initiative.

**Student Intern** — *May – September 2019*
Ministère de l'Économie et des Finances, Paris, France

**Research Assistant** — *January – May 2019*
Revue Française d'Administration Publique (RFAP) / École Nationale d'Administration (ENA), Strasbourg, France

---

## Research Visits

| Year | Institution | Location | Host |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2026 | Sciences Po – CRIS | Paris, France | Dr. Lucas Chancel |
| 2025 | Technical University of Munich (TUM) | Munich, Germany | Pr. Florian Egli |
| Feb.–Mar. 2025 | Duke University | Durham, USA | Pr. Felwine Sarr |
| Feb.–Jun. 2023 | Senegalese Institute for Agricultural Research (ISRA) | Dakar, Senegal | Pr. Tamsir Mbaye |

---

## Fellowships & Awards

- **2026** — Charles Gide Grant, Economy and Philosophy research program
- **2023** — CLAND Grant (cross-disciplinary research on biodiversity dynamics and land-use socio-economics)
- **2022** — [Veblen Prize](https://www.veblen-institute.org/Morgane-Gonon-et-Mandie-Joulin-co-laureates-du-Prix-Veblen-2022.html) — Master's Thesis Award

---

## Policy Experience

**Expert, French Delegation** (Ministry of Foreign Affairs)
IPBES Plenary on Business and Biodiversity, Manchester, UK — *February 2026*

**Invited Speaker**, Ministry of Finance (Hacienda), Bogotá, Colombia — *March 2025*

**Delegate**, Young Scholars Initiative (IUCN France)
COP 15 on Biodiversity, Montreal, Canada — *December 2022*

---

## Publications

See the [Research](research.qmd) page for the full list.

---

## Skills

**Programming:** R (data.table, tidyverse, Rcpp), Python, LaTeX

**Methods:** Ecological economics · SFC macroeconomic modelling · Econometrics · Sensitivity analysis · Optimal transport · NLP/text analysis · Multi-objective optimisation

**Languages:** French (native) · English (C1) · German (B2) · Russian (A2)

---

## Referees

| | |
|---|---|
| **Pr. Harold Levrel** — AgroParisTech, Biodiversity Economics — [harold.levrel@agroparistech.fr](mailto:harold.levrel@agroparistech.fr) | **Dr. Antoine Godin** — Macroeconomist, AFD — [godina@afd.fr](mailto:godina@afd.fr) |
| **Dr. Rémi Prudhomme** — Researcher, CIRAD — [remi.prudhomme@cirad.fr](mailto:remi.prudhomme@cirad.fr) | **Dr. Romain Svartzman** — Economist, Bocconi — [romain.svartzman@unibocconi.it](mailto:romain.svartzman@unibocconi.it) |
